    FeatureAbandonMojo - Class in network.ike.plugin.ws
    Abandon a feature branch across all workspace components.

    Creates this goal instance.
    FeatureFinishMergeMojo - Class in network.ike.plugin.ws
    No-fast-forward merge of a feature branch, preserving full history.

    Creates this goal instance.
    FeatureFinishRebaseMojo - Class in network.ike.plugin.ws
    Rebase feature branch onto target, then fast-forward merge.

    Creates this goal instance.
    FeatureFinishSquashMojo - Class in network.ike.plugin.ws
    Squash-merge a feature branch back to the target branch.

    Creates this goal instance.

    Preview a coordinated feature branch creation without executing.

    Creates this goal instance.
